attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.REG_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.ACC_SEGMENT_VALUE, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.ORG_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_INSTANCE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_COA_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.BALANCING_SEGMENT, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_ACCT_CURRENCY, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.ACTIVE, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.ZERO_FLAG, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.MASTER, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_SET_OF_BOOKS, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_ORG, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.MD_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS,
 (
 select TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS
 minus
 select TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID = STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS)
